problem_solved: 911 call centers and first responders lack critical real-time data about emergencies - location accuracy, medical history, crash details, hazards - leading to delayed or inadequate response
solution_description: Mission-critical intelligence platform that bridges the data gap between emergency callers and 911/dispatchers by integrating data from connected devices (telematics, wearables, smartphones, building systems) directly into PSAP systems using HARMONY AI for instant data delivery to first responders
traction_signals: Partnership with Uber for driver/rider safety
Raptor Technologies partnership for school safety
notes: Clearinghouse model connecting enterprise data to 911. HARMONY AI enables real-time data fusion. Strong Varden fit - solves data connectivity problem in emergency response chain.
